site.name: Surya Self Drive Car Rental
site.tagline: Self drive car rental with instant booking, doorstep delivery, and no hidden charges.
site.description: Book Thar, Scorpio, Verna, Amaze, i20, Swift, Brezza, Venue and more self drive cars from Surya Self Drive Car Rental. 12 hour and 24 hour packages with clear kilometre limits.

booking.defaultPickupArea: Fortune 80. office no.404. University road. udaipur. Raj. 313001
terms: Extra kilometres, fuel policy, refundable security, and ID requirements can be confirmed during booking.

trustBadges.title: No hidden charges
trustBadges.text: Transparent 12 hour and 24 hour prices before you book.

trustBadges.title: Instant booking
trustBadges.text: Send your trip details on WhatsApp and get quick availability.

trustBadges.title: Doorstep delivery
trustBadges.text: Ask for delivery to your home, hotel, office, or pickup point.

testimonials.name: Amit Sharma
testimonials.text: Clear pricing, quick response, and the car was delivered on time.

testimonials.name: Priya Singh
testimonials.text: Good self drive experience. Booking was simple and there were no surprise charges.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.text: Clean car and helpful service. Recommended for weekend trips.

faq.question: What is included in the 12 hour package?
faq.answer: The 12 hour package includes a 150 km limit. Confirm extra kilometre charges and fuel policy while booking.

faq.question: What is included in the 24 hour package?
faq.answer: The 24 hour package includes a 300 km limit. Extra kilometres can be confirmed before your trip.

faq.question: Can I book instantly on WhatsApp?
faq.answer: Yes. Share your car choice, date, pickup time, and pickup location on WhatsApp for quick availability.

faq.question: Is doorstep delivery available?
faq.answer: Doorstep delivery can be requested for home, hotel, office, or another pickup point, subject to availability.
